mapper.insert: INSERT INTO disposal (disposal_id, reason, status, created_by, created_at) VALUES (#{disposalId}, #{reason}, 'REQUESTED', #{empId}, SYSTIMESTAMP)

INSERT INTO disposal_detail (disposal_detail_id, disposal_id, inventory_lot_id, product_id, disposal_qty, reason) VALUES (#{disposalDetailId}, #{disposalId}, #{inventoryLotId}, #{productId}, #{disposalQty}, #{reason})
mapper.update: UPDATE disposal SET status='APPROVED', approved_by=#{approvedBy}, approved_at=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE disposal_id = #{disposalId} AND status = 'REQUESTED'
UPDATE disposal SET status = 'COMPLETED', completed_at=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE disposal_id = #{disposalId} AND status = 'APPROVED'
mapper.select: SELECT inventory_lot_id as "inventoryLotId", product_id as "productId", current_qty as "currentQty", status as "status" FROM inventory_lot WHERE inventory_lot_id = #{inventoryLotId} FOR UPDATE WAIT 5
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_movement (movement_id, inventory_lot_id, movement_type, source_type, source_id, before_qty, qty, after_qty, created_by, created_at) VALUES (#{stmvSeq}, #{inventoryLotId}, 'DISPOSAL', 'DISPOSAL_DETAIL', #{disposalDetailId}, #{beforeQty}, #{disposalQty}, #{afterQty}, #{empId}, SYSTIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT disposal_detail_id, disposal_id, inventory_lot_id, product_id, disposal_qty, reason FROM disposal_detail WHERE disposal_id = #{disposalId} ORDER BY disposal_detail_id
mapper.update: UPDATE inventory_lot SET status = CASE WHEN current_qty = 0 THEN 'SOLD_OUT' ELSE 'NORMAL' END WHERE inventory_lot_id = #{inventoryLotId}
